intent: Write a sentiment-analysis report on 'the state of consumer electronics trust' using storefront ratings and Reddit complaints. You MUST research BOTH sources: (1) the One Stop Market shopping site — browse the electronics category and collect at least 5 products spanning at least three sub-types (headphones, smart home, cable/accessory, wearable, or portable audio). Record name, price, rating, review count. (2) Reddit — browse /f/technology AND /f/headphones for posts discussing brand trust, fake reviews, planned obsolescence, or quality decline. Collect at least 3 posts with title, score, comment count. The report must: (a) tabulate the storefront products with confidence ratings, (b) extract at least three concrete community complaints about the electronics market, (c) analyze which of your storefront picks look most vulnerable to the community's concerns, (d) finish with a trust-weighted top-3 recommendation. Cite every claim.
author_notes: Shopping (electronics) + Reddit (technology + headphones). Trust-weighted ranking is the novel twist.
